name: Sumou Real Estate Company
summary: Sumou Real Estate Company engages in the development, management, maintenance, sale, and rental of residential and non-residential properties in Saudi Arabia. It also engages in the general building contracts, including construction, repair and renovation, and demolition for residential compounds, commercial centers, educational and entertainment, health and sports facilities, and hotels and restaurants; the provision of real estate project management services; and investment in real estate and project development. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Al Khobar, Saudi Arabia. Sumou Real Estate Company is a subsidiary of Sumou Holding Company.
